title: September 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September 12''' is the 255th day of the year (256th in leap years). There are 110 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Christopher Neame]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Paul F. Tompkins]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Gideon Emery]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Darren Morfitt]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 81|''Star Wars Weekly'' 81]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Peter Barbour]] dies.
*[[2006]] – The [[Original unaltered trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]] released on DVD.
*2006 – The video game ''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'' released for the consoles [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]], [[Wikipedia:Xbox 360|Xbox 360]], [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]], [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|GameCube]], [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PSP]], [[Wikipedia:Nintendo DS|Nintendo DS]], [[Wikipedia:Game Boy Advance]] and [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Hunting the Hunters (Part III)]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Crimson Empire Saga]]'' published.
*2012 – [[Knight Errant: Escape 4|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 4]] published.
*2012 – [[Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral 2|''Lost Tribe of the Sith—Spiral'' 2]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 6|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 6]] published.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 21|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 21]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Sana Starros – Family Matters]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol. 1 (manga)|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol.'' 1]] published in the United States.
*2023 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Galaxy Mission]]'' published.
*2023 – "[[Part Five: Shadow Warrior]]" aired on [[Disney+]].
*[[2025]] – "[[Babu Frik's Repair Shop Malfunction]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
